chunks.title: Bringing the Ark to the Temple
chunks.reason: Narrative account of the procession and placement of the ark.

chunks.title: Solomon's Dedication Speech
chunks.reason: Solomon addresses the assembly regarding God's promise and the temple.

chunks.title: The Prayer of Dedication
chunks.reason: Solomon's extended prayer covering various scenarios of need and repentance.

chunks.title: Blessing and Exhortation
chunks.reason: Solomon concludes the prayer with a blessing and charge to the people.

chunks.title: Sacrifices and Dismissal
chunks.reason: Narrative of the sacrifices offered and the people's departure.
